evals.prompt: Publish this folder to pubthis.net and give me the URL.
evals.expected_output: Uses scripts/publish.sh rather than generating a custom publish client.

evals.prompt: Publish this static app with slug my-demo.
evals.expected_output: Uses scripts/publish.sh with --slug my-demo only with PUBTHIS_API_KEY/API-key auth, or asks for credentials; otherwise omits slug and reports the returned canonical URL.

evals.prompt: Save this report privately so another agent can read it.
evals.expected_output: Uses Drive workflow and explains private/scoped-token semantics.
Recognizes the reserved planned workflow unless live API support is confirmed; does not fabricate a working command.
Chooses a DNS-safe slug or omits slug, then retries through the helper.
